New York State College of Human Ecology. Alumni Affairs and Development Office records, 1922-2014.
Collection Number: 23-11-4061

Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Library

DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY

Title:
New York State College of Human Ecology. Alumni Affairs and Development Office records, 1922-2014.
Repository:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Collection Number:
23-11-4061
Abstract:
Correspondence from alumni and alumnae.
Creator:
New York State College of Human Ecology. Alumni Affairs and Development Office
Quanitities:
11.4 cubic feet.
Language:
Collection material in English
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION

Correspondence from alumni and alumnae.
INFORMATION FOR USERS
Cite As:

New York State College of Human Ecology Alumni Affairs and Development Office Records, #23-11-4061. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:

Access to Boxes 1, 2, and 10 restricted to the permission of the office of origin with the exception of records of deceased alumni.
SUBJECTS

Names:
Cornell University -- : Alumni and alumnae.
Cornell University -- : Students.
